column1: # This file is loaded as a type_wiring_def record file. Each row registers
# wiring contributions for one typeName via the type-wiring registry.
# loadOrder=6 (set in Files.tsv) places this file before the item / boss
# data files, so the registrations are in place by the time those files
# load. Convention is to name such files TypeWiring.tsv, but the engine
# recognises them by record type (`type_wiring_def`), not by filename.
# This row says: every file whose typeName extends `Item` (core's Item.tsv
# plus expansion's ExpansionItem.tsv) gets an extra warning-level check

column2: {expr="count(rows) >= 1 or 'item file should have at least one row'",level="warn"}
